# Refund Window

## Definition

The refund window is the period after delivery during which a Larkstead customer can return an item for a full refund. The standard window runs 30 days from the delivery scan; holiday orders placed in November or December get an extended 60 day window.

## Notes

Returns arriving after the window closes are handled case by case by the support lead. Store credit is the default fallback when the window has lapsed by less than a week.
